_comment: Per-model split-point policies. Each policy lists which boundary indices (0-indexed, length N-1) may be active. Disabled boundaries are always 0.
_boundary_semantics: Boundary k = split between chunk k and chunk k+1 in dag_aligned_full order.

_notes.paper_like: Skip within-pair boundaries (between Conv and its ReLU). Keep after-relu, after-maxpool, after-avgpool, after-flatten, after-dropout.
_notes.stage: Only after each major pooling group (MaxPool 2,5,12) and after flatten (14).
_notes.five_points: Five major design-phase boundaries: after each MaxPool (2,5,12), after flatten (14), after first FC/ReLU group (17).
_notes.ten_points: Ten materializable design-phase boundaries selected from paper_like, covering feature groups and classifier transitions.
_notes.major_blocks: Major architectural exits: conv1+pool, conv2+pool, conv3, conv4, conv5+pool, flatten, fc1+relu, fc2+relu.

_notes.paper_like: Skip within-stem splits (conv1/bn1/relu/maxpool fused into stem). Split between BasicBlocks and after avgpool.
_notes.stage: After stem (3), after each layer pair: layer1(5), layer2(7), layer3(9), layer4(11), after avgpool(12).
_notes.five_points: Five major design-phase boundaries: after stem (3) and after each residual layer pair (5,7,9,11).
_notes.ten_points: All ten policy-safe paper_like boundaries; still does not split inside BasicBlock residual internals.
_notes.major_blocks: Major materializable exits: stem, residual layer1, layer2, layer3, layer4, avgpool. BasicBlock internals remain disabled.

_notes.paper_like: Skip within-pair boundaries (Conv -> ReLU within same conv-relu pair). Keep after-relu, after-maxpool, after-avgpool, after-flatten, after-dropout in classifier.
_notes.stage: Only after each conv group MaxPool (4,9,18,27,36) and after flatten (38). 6 major architectural split points.
_notes.five_points: Five major design-phase boundaries: after each VGG convolutional group MaxPool (4,9,18,27,36).
_notes.ten_points: Ten materializable design-phase boundaries: five feature group exits plus avgpool/flatten/classifier transitions.
_notes.major_blocks: Major architectural exits: five conv-group maxpools, avgpool, flatten, fc1+relu+dropout, fc2+relu+dropout.
Placeholder. ViT registry support exists, but dag_aligned_full chunk materialization is pending transformer-specific wrappers.
